case_title: PACIFIC TITLE & MARBLE INC. VS LAND MARK BLDG.&ENGINEER. CONTRACTORS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC TITLE & MARBLE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAND MARK BLDG.&ENGINEER. CONTRACTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAND MARK BLDG.&ENGINEER. CONTRACTORS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC TITLE & MARBLE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAND MARK BLDG.&ENGINEER. CONTRACTORS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $564.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LAND MARK BLDG.&ENGINEER. CONTRACTORS
